description: Fix Retry-After header parsing in the Slack plugin to use the SDK's parseRetryAfterMs utility instead of reimplementing it with incomplete HTTP-date handling.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/slack && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Use SDK parseRetryAfterMs in Slack API caller
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the Slack plugin to correctly parse Retry-After headers in both seconds and HTTP-date formats so that AI agents receive valid retry timing metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Lines ~415-419 in slack-api.ts use parseRetryAfterMs from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk instead of the manual parseInt + isNaN pattern
The import for parseRetryAfterMs is added to the existing @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk import line
HTTP-date format Retry-After values are correctly parsed into milliseconds instead of being silently discarded as undefined
cd plugins/slack && npm run build passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/slack && npm run format:check passes
